title: Slightly Nutmeg Flavoured
description: This Modpack focuses on spicing up the vanilla experience, As well as providing some fun new combat and QOL experiences, all while providing quality optimization options!
body: ![Splash banner showcasing logo and text](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/871983279484567602/1157088083456569364/IMG_3322.PNG?ex=651755c0&is=65160440&hm=f0fd1dd36f56b4a2e2753ddb20383f985a0fbb0dcac2349acfcd31c57885cae7&=&width=1440&height=482) **This Modpack focuses on spicing up the vanilla experience, As well as providing some fun new combat and QOL experiences, all while providing quality optimization options!** --- **Join Our Minecraft Server! BHKNutmeg.mcserv.fun** ***Fight terrifying bosses and gain awesome weaponry!*** Use your hauls to craft insane weapons and armour! ![Litch Boss Slightly Nutmeg Flavoured](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/871983279484567602/1152153077579788308/2023-09-15_03.40.32.png) ### Relax and craft your dream home! Craft furniture and decorate your home! Create restaurants and Bakeries and much More! ![Hammoc and furnature](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/871983279484567602/1152153078234091530/2023-09-15_03.03.33.png)
